summary: Private credit disarray spells opportunity for housing giant Pretium, which targets high returns by lending to US homebuilders. “Our private credit looks a little bit different than other private credit in the sense that we are secured, we have real good downside protection,” Jon Pruzan, the company’s co-president, tells Bloomberg News’ James Crombie and Bloomberg Intelligence’s Erica Adelberg in this episode of the Credit Edge podcast. “We have a lot of people who want capital and not a lot of

title: Macro Matters: BE’s Anna Wong on Warsh, Fed & Inflation Outlook
title_cn: 宏观问题：BE 的 Anna Wong 谈 Warsh、美联储和美联储通胀前景
summary: With Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as Federal Reserve chair behind him, the discourse can move to what it signals for monetary policy. Bloomberg Economics Chief US Economist Anna Wong joins Ira Jersey on this edition of Macro Matters and argues that while Warsh avoided explicit forward guidance, his emphasis was on price stability, skepticism toward forecast precision and support for a shorter policy statement all point to a more hawkish lean than many investors expected.

summary: Bayer, facing tens of thousands of lawsuits over weedkiller Roundup, has set its sights on the Supreme Court. Dale Mullen, partner and co-chair of the business and corporate law section at Whiteford, joins Bloomberg Intelligence litigation analyst Holly Froum on this episode of the Votes and Verdicts podcast to discuss Bayer Monsanto’s appeal to the US Supreme Court of a $1.25 million verdict holding it liable for failing to warn that Roundup causes cancer. They discuss Bayer’s arguments, the co

title: US Looks To Expand Nuclear as AI Drives Up Energy Demand
title_cn: 随着人工智能推高能源需求，美国寻求扩大核能
summary: Liz Muller, Co-Founder and CEO of Deep Fission AND Will Wade, Bloomberg News Energy Reporter join Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss Deep Fission's Nasdaq trading debut and the states of the nuclear industry in the US. Nuclear has regained public support in the AI era. The fuel source is capable of delivering 24/7 power on its own, unlike wind and solar. But while small modular reactors have tantalized hyperscalers and governments hoping to win the AI race, the technology has yet to break through on electric grids. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Dips as US-Iran Deal Takes Effect, Ships Return to Hormuz
title_cn: 随着美伊协议生效，石油价格下跌，船只返回霍尔木兹
summary: Oil dipped as the US and Iran’s interim peace deal took effect and a flurry of tankers began transiting the Strait of Hormuz, paving the way to restart the flow of millions of barrels shut in by the conflict.

title: ICE Reverses Plan to Use Mega-Warehouses for Migrant Detention
title_cn: ICE 撤销使用大型仓库拘留移民的计划
summary: The Department of Homeland Security is backing away from a controversial plan to turn empty warehouses into immigration detention centers and will keep relying largely on existing jails run by private contractors and state and local partners.

title: Warsh Builds Credibility, Had to Sound Hawkish: Patton
title_cn: 沃什建立信誉，必须听起来鹰派：巴顿
summary: Jamie Patton, co-head of global rates at TCW, and Mark Cabana, co-head of global rates research at BofA Securities, join Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh vowed to restore price stability following his first policy meeting since taking the helm of the US central bank, after officials left interest rates unchanged and signaled growing support for rate hikes this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dog Recovers From Screwworm But Origin Puzzles Officials
title_cn: 狗从螺旋虫中康复，但起源令官员困惑
summary: A New Mexico dog infected with the New World screwworm has recovered, but questions remain over how the animal contracted the parasite.

title: How FIFA Picks World Cup Host Cities | Sports City
title_cn: 国际足联如何选择世界杯主办城市体育城
summary: FIFA is projected to pull in a staggering $10.9 billion from the World Cup—a 56% jump from the last tournament. Meanwhile, the host cities and stadiums don't see a single dime from ticket sales or sponsorships. Bloomberg’s Randall Williams takes you inside the intense bids, the multimillion-dollar stadium upgrades and why cities still fight for the chaos.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Climb as US-Iran Deal Eases Inflation Angst: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊协议缓解通胀忧虑，股市上涨：市场结束
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback that saw stocks joining bonds higher after a peace deal between the US and Iran spurred optimism that a revival of the Strait of Hormuz will ease inflation risks.

title: The Electric Grid Is 'Not Going To Work' As Is For Data Centers Says FERC's Swett
title_cn: FERC 的 Swett 表示，电网“无法正常工作”，就像数据中心一样
summary: The chair of the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission Laura Swett joined Balance of Power joined to discuss the power demand for datacenters. She said interventionist and unprecedented action will be needed to connect power-hungry data centers to US grids while protecting consumers,Without changes, the country’s electric grids are “not going to work.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kenya to Raise $763 Million After Lawmakers Tone Down Tax Plan
title_cn: 立法者缓和税收计划后肯尼亚将筹集 7.63 亿美元
summary: Kenyan lawmakers watered down a slew of tax proposals fronted by the Treasury that would have raised nearly $1 billion for the East African nation’s budget.

title: US Ends Hormuz Blockade, Downplays Tolls as 60-Day Clock Starts
title_cn: 美国结束霍尔木兹封锁，淡化死亡人数，60 天倒计时开始
summary: The US-Iran interim peace deal took effect and shipping started returning to the Strait of Hormuz as the US declared an end to its blockade and a complex negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program began in earnest. Mona Yacoubian, Director and senior adviser of the Middle East Program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies joins Balance of Power to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bank of Canada Can Let Loonie Weaken and Skip Hikes, BofA Says
title_cn: 美银表示，加拿大央行可以让加元走弱并跳过加息
summary: The Bank of Canada is likely to keep rates on hold through most of 2027 and allow the Canadian dollar to weaken further even if US monetary policy tightens, Bank of America says.

title: Fed Officials Edge Closer to Rate Hikes As Warsh Takes The Reins
title_cn: 沃什上任后美联储官员更接近加息
summary: Former Federal Reserve Vice Chair Lael Brainard joined Balance of Power to discuss  Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed Chair. She said several of the task forces Fed Chair Kevin Warsh announced yesterday could be ways he tries to move the committee more into a direction of lowering rates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bessent Urged by US Senators to Push China on Undervalued Yuan
title_cn: 美国参议员敦促贝森特向中国施压人民币低估
summary: A bipartisan duo of senators has called on Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent to step up cooperation with the Group of Seven to pressure China into addressing what they called a deliberate suppression of its exchange rate for commercial advantage.

title: Long-End Yields Will End 2026 at Levels Rarely Seen in Last Decade, Survey Shows
title_cn: 调查显示，到 2026 年末，长期收益率将达到过去十年罕见的水平
summary: Thirty-year Treasury yields will most likely push back over 5% by the end of the year, the latest Markets Pulse survey showed, signaling some doubts about whether the Federal Reserve will move quickly to enough rein in the recent inflation surge.

title: Mexico’s Banxico Issues New Rules to Boost Digital Payments
title_cn: 墨西哥央行发布新规则以促进数字支付
summary: Mexico’s central bank published on Wednesday new rules to simplify digital payments as well as increase the deposit limits on accounts for small businesses as part of efforts to curb cash dealings in the country.

title: US Bond Futures Surge to Drive Wagers on a July Fed Rate Hike
title_cn: 美国债券期货飙升，推动对 7 月美联储加息的押注
summary: The Treasury market saw a record surge in futures trading that underpins bets that the Federal Reserve’s next move will be to boost interest rates.

title: Chemicals Maker Ashland Pushed to Sell by Activist Cruiser
title_cn: 化学品制造商阿什兰被激进巡洋舰推动出售
summary: Cruiser Capital Advisors is pushing Ashland Inc. to sell itself, increasing the pressure on the specialty chemicals company after another activist investor called for a sale earlier this month.

summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: TCW Co-Head of Global Rates Jamie Patton, BoFA Securities Co-Head of Global Rates Research Mark Cabana, Oaktree Capital Management Managing Director Danielle Poli, Goldman Sachs Chief Credit Strategist Amanda Lynam (Source: Bloomberg)

title: USMCA Talks Take Virtual Turn as Trump Fuels More Doubts on Deal
title_cn: 随着特朗普引发更多对协议的疑虑，USMCA 谈判出现实质性转变
summary: The next scheduled negotiating session over the future of the North American free trade pact will take place virtually at the start of next month, according to the Mexican minister leading the talks, who has sought to project optimism for a deal even as US President Donald Trump has adopted the opposite stance in recent days.

title: Bitcoin Falls Back Toward $60,000 on Strategy Shares, Rate Fears
title_cn: 策略股、利率担忧导致比特币回落至 60,000 美元
summary: Bitcoin extended its slide back toward the $60,000 level. The decline is driven by mounting concerns over the unraveling of Strategy Inc.’s funding mechanism, alongside rate-hike fears that are dampening demand for riskier assets.

title: Brazil Assets Slide as Central Bank Rate Cut Spurs Market Angst
title_cn: 央行降息引发市场焦虑，巴西资产下滑
summary: Brazilian markets sold off on Thursday as investors criticized the central bank for cutting interest rates while flagging a worsening inflation outlook.

title: Heart Health Biotech Kardigan Up 27% After $400 Million IPO
title_cn: 心脏健康生物技术公司 Kardigan 首次公开募股 4 亿美元后股价上涨 27%
summary: Kardigan Inc. shares surged 27% in its trading debut, after the heart-health focused biotech raised $400 million in an initial public offering.

title: Banks Slap Big Discount on Stuck Software LBO Loan to Shed Risk
title_cn: 银行对陷入困境的软件杠杆收购贷款提供大幅折扣以规避风险
summary: A group of banks led by Bank of Montreal is offering a steep discount on a $775 million loan for software firm Pellera Technologies that they’ve been stuck holding for more than a year.

title: Jeremy Grantham Points to a Watershed Moment for Big Tech
title_cn: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆指出大型科技公司的分水岭时刻
summary: Everyone’s battling on the same frontier.

title: Intel Surges on Apple Deal | Open Interest 6/18/2026
title_cn: 英特尔因苹果交易而飙升未平仓合约 2026 年 6 月 18 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Trump’s Iran deal reopens Hormuz. We talk to Livia Paggi at J.S. Held about the questions that remain. Plus,  Kevin Warsh shocks markets at the Fed, Intel rides the made-in-America AI chip push, and LIV Golf’s Scott O’Neil fights for the league’s future. Plus, we are live from the Knicks parade in New York City as festivities kick off. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Record $21 Billion Water Bonds Sold With Trump Budget Cuts Ahead
title_cn: 特朗普削减预算，水债券发行量创纪录 210 亿美元
summary: Water utilities are selling bonds at a record pace to upgrade aging pipes and meet tougher regulations as they prepare for a potential pullback in federal funding.

title: A Return to $3 Gasoline? Here’s What It Will Take
title_cn: 汽油价格回归 3 美元？这就是需要做的事情
summary: Oil prices have plummeted following news of a US-Iran deal that is meant to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but US drivers probably will have to wait a while for cheaper gasoline. Traders and analysts say that prices are unlikely to fall to pre-crisis levels until stockpiles of crude oil and gasoline are replenished, which probably won’t happen before the end of 2026.

title: Dollar Sees ‘Bullish Break’ as Fed Rate-Hike Bets Fuel Rally
title_cn: 美联储加息押注推动美元反弹，美元迎来“看涨突破”
summary: The dollar staged its biggest two-day rally in nearly three months, driving it back toward the late-March peak, as traders piled into bets that the Federal Reserve will start raising interest rates as soon as late next month.

title: Big Tech Stock Buybacks Vanish as AI Spending Spree Eats Up Cash
title_cn: 随着人工智能支出热潮耗尽现金，大型科技股回购消失
summary: The artificial-intelligence race is becoming so expensive that it’s snuffing out one of the key forces that has helped keep Big Tech stocks soaring for years: steady share buybacks.

title: Veja os Assuntos que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
title_cn: 查看巴西本周的热点话题
summary: Confira os assuntos que foram destaque da semana no Brasil com Patricia Xavier. Produção de Barbara Nascimento e Gisele Fernandes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman’s Pullen Ross: PE ‘Actively Engaged’ in Sports
title_cn: 高盛的普伦·罗斯：体育界“积极参与”体育运动
summary: Nicole Pullen Ross, Northeast Region Head & Head of Sports and Entertainment Solutions at Goldman Sachs, discusses the evolving landscape of US sports and the athletes driving their growing popularity. She highlighted her role in creating a division at Goldman Sachs dedicated to helping professional athletes manage their wealth by applying strategies typically used by C-suite executives. she speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Even Madonna Has to Fight for Every Scrap of Internet Attention
title_cn: 甚至麦当娜也必须为互联网上的每一点关注而奋斗
summary: Even if you’re one of the biggest pop stars in history, Grindr and Bilt can help you sell albums

title: Rumble Bets on AI Compute Demand With New AI Platform
title_cn: Rumble 通过新的人工智能平台押注人工智能计算需求
summary: Video platform Rumble is jumping on the AI bandwagon with its newest AI platform. Launching as Quake AI, the new sector combines cloud, compute, and AI infrastructure, and is slated to dominate the company's business segment. Rumble CEO Chris Pavlovski joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" with more on the pivot. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Anticipate Fresh Liquidity Following Historic SpaceX Debut
title_cn: 投资者预计 SpaceX 历史性首次亮相后将出现新的流动性
summary: SpaceX's historic public debut comes during a critical inflection point as a wave of multibillion-dollar AI companies prepare to go public. With the unprecedented IPO, investors are anticipating a wide-scale "distribution event" that will give private markets the fresh cash it desperately needs. Matt Witheiler, Head of Late-Stage Growth at Wellington Management, thinks the private tech ecosystem will see a cash return. He joins Ed Ludlow of "Bloomberg Tech". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Look Beyond Chips For Next Big Thing in Tech
title_cn: 投资者不仅关注芯片，还关注科技领域的下一个重大事件
summary: As the AI hype continues to grow, investors are looking beyond chips to find the next big thing to revolutionize the tech sector. Ankur Crawford, Portfolio Manager at Alger, says there hasn't been a business like SpaceX before as markets react to the significance of the AI trade. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech".  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Workers Say Data Center Testimony Prompted HR Calls
title_cn: 亚马逊员工表示数据中心的证词促使人力资源部致电
summary: Three Amazon.com Inc. workers say the company violated a Seattle ordinance by interrogating them after they testified in favor of regulation of data centers in the city.

title: Google’s Secret Warrant Fight Over DOJ Pipe Bomb Probe Revealed
title_cn: 谷歌关于美国司法部管道炸弹调查的秘密授权之争曝光
summary: Google waged a secret court fight against a US warrant demanding identities of hundreds of internet users who searched for the Democratic and Republican party headquarters in Washington before pipe bombs were planted there on the eve of the Capitol riot on Jan. 6, 2021, newly unsealed records reveal.

title: Tesla Stock Underperforms SpaceX in First Week After IPO
title_cn: 特斯拉股价在 IPO 后第一周表现逊于 SpaceX
summary: Tesla Inc. stock is set to end the holiday-shortened week lower after SpaceX went public last Friday.

title: Autonomous Trucks Can Be Life-Saving
title_cn: 自动驾驶卡车可以拯救生命
summary: After experiencing the technology firsthand, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Thomas Black examined the data to find out what autonomous trucks could mean for the future of road safety. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rise With Nvidia Leading as Semiconductor Companies Surge
title_cn: 半导体公司激增，英伟达领涨，股价上涨
summary: US stocks rose on Thursday as chips shares extended Wednesday’s rally. Nvidia Corp. topped S&P 500 Index gainers on a points basis, while the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index, known as the SOX, advanced more than 6% to a record high.

title: Ukraine's Denikeieva on Building AI for Citizens
title_cn: 乌克兰的 Denikeieva 谈为公民构建人工智能
summary: Ukraine’s Deputy Minister of Digital Transformation Nataliia Denikeieva discusses digital resiliency and building artificial intelligence for citizens, with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Steinberger, LeCun, Habib on AI Deployment
title_cn: Steinberger、LeCun、Habib 谈人工智能部署
summary: Austrian programmer Peter Steinberger, AMI Labs's Yann LeCun, and Writer CEO May Habib discuss the possibilities and deployment of artificial intelligence with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alibaba's Tsai, zu Furstenberg Discuss AI Investment
title_cn: 阿里巴巴董事局主席蔡崇信将与芙丝汀宝讨论人工智能投资
summary: Alibaba Group Chairman Joe Tsai and General Catalyst Managing Director Jeannette zu Furstenberg discuss investment opportunities and leadership with the development of artificial intelligence with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WWW Inventor Tim Berners-Lee on Development of AI
title_cn: WWW 发明家 Tim Berners-Lee 谈人工智能的发展
summary: Tim Berners-Lee, the inventor of the World Wide Web, discusses the development of artificial intelligence with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Extends Two-Day Drop a Week After Largest-Ever IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 在史上最大规模 IPO 后一周延长两天跌幅
summary: SpaceX is proving that even the largest-ever IPO is not immune to the type of share-price volatility that tends to rock big companies after they go public.

title: US Acts to Accelerate Power Grid Hook-Ups for AI Data Centers
title_cn: 美国加速人工智能数据中心并网的法案
summary: US regulators have taken their biggest step yet to speed the connection of data centers to the country’s grids while simultaneously attempting to slow surging utility bills that have angered Americans.

title: Anduril Secures Landmark Air Force Drone Contract
title_cn: 安杜里尔 (Anduril) 获得具有里程碑意义的空军无人机合同
summary: Anduril just won a production contract for autonomous fighters with the US Air Force. It's also secured a key role in the race to provide software for those aircraft, and is moving toward scaled manufacturing as the Pentagon pushes for a fleet of up to 1,000 autonomous combat jets. Anduril CEO Brian Schimpf joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss it all. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Rallies After Trump Says It Struck Apple Chip Deal
title_cn: 特朗普表示与苹果达成芯片协议后英特尔股价上涨
summary:
Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.
Anurag Rana, Senior Tech Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence, discusses the deal and what it means for both companies and the broader tech landscape. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Rallies After Trump Says It Struck Apple Chip Deal
title_cn: 特朗普表示与苹果达成芯片协议后英特尔股价上涨
summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.

title: Healthcare's Next AI Revolution
title_cn: 医疗保健的下一次人工智能革命
summary: Infinitus CEO Ankit Jain joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the next generation of AI won't be copilots or chatbots—but autonomous agents that handle healthcare tasks end-to-end. He discusses insurance approvals, rising AI costs, healthcare inefficiencies, and why the industry must focus on outcomes instead of computation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Intel Inked Chip Deal With Apple
title_cn: 特朗普表示英特尔与苹果签署了芯片协议
summary: US President Donald Trump said Intel will work alongside Apple to design and produce semiconductors domestically. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon in Talks to Sell Custom AI Chips in Bid to Undercut Nvidia
title_cn: 亚马逊正在洽谈销售定制人工智能芯片，以削弱英伟达的竞争力
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is in talks to sell its custom-made artificial intelligence chips for use in other companies’ data centers, a key expansion of its efforts to cut into Nvidia Corp.’s dominance.

title: Jeremy Grantham on How to Tell if a Bubble’s About to Burst
title_cn: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆谈如何判断泡沫是否即将破裂
summary:
Jeremy Grantham has a long history of calling bubbles.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, GMO's co-founder and chief investment strategist tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway what he thinks about Mag 7's multibillion-dollar investment into AI and the signs he watches out for to spot when a bubble might burst. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo’s Shutterfly Debt Concessions Expose AI, Competition Risk
title_cn: Apollo 的 Shutterfly 债务减让暴露了人工智能和竞争风险
summary: Shutterfly’s track record in credit markets has been far from picture-perfect, but its latest refinancing laid bare a newer challenge: the cost of managing burdensome debt amid intensifying competition in an artificial intelligence economy.

title: How Meter Pricing Is Testing the Economics of AI
title_cn: 电表定价如何考验人工智能的经济性
summary: Silicon Valley spent much of the past few years feverishly pushing consumers and businesses to inject artificial intelligence into every corner of their lives. Now AI developers want their customers to pay more for the technology they actually use.

title: Waymo Recalls Robotaxis Over Driving Through Freeway Work Zones
title_cn: Waymo 召回超过高速公路工作区的机器人出租车
summary: Waymo is recalling thousands of its robotaxis to fix a software issue that could cause the autonomous vehicles to enter and drive at speed through freeway construction zones.

title: Accenture Forecast Sends Stock Tumbling a Record 20%
title_cn: 埃森哲预测股价暴跌创纪录 20%
summary: Accenture Plc said it’s expecting to reel in less revenue in the coming months, as artificial intelligence upends the consulting services industry and clients paused business due to the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Anthropic Lays Out Vision for How to Bolster AI Models’ Safety
title_cn: Anthropic 提出了如何增强人工智能模型安全性的愿景
summary: Anthropic PBC co-founder Jack Clark said the company is in daily discussions with the Trump administration to resolve security concerns surrounding the startup’s top two artificial intelligence models and outlined his vision for ensuring the safety of the emerging technology.

title: Trump Antagonist Picked by DC Democrats in Mayoral Primary Race
title_cn: 特朗普的对手在市长初选中被华盛顿特区民主党人选中
summary: Democratic voters in Washington, DC, picked Councilwoman Janeese Lewis George as their top choice in the city’s mayoral primary, putting the self-described democratic socialist on course to become President Donald Trump’s latest antagonist in the nation’s capital.

title: Vance Dances Around Tolls Question That Shipping’s Obsessed With
title_cn: 万斯围绕航运业痴迷的通行费问题跳舞
summary: US Vice President JD Vance skirted questions about whether Iran will one day be able to charge fees for vessels crossing the Strait of Hormuz, a critical concern for the oil and shipping industries as well as Gulf producers as the chokepoint opens up to traffic again.

title: US Ends Hormuz Blockade, Downplays Tolls as Negotiations Restart
title_cn: 美国结束霍尔木兹封锁，淡化死亡人数，重启谈判
summary: The US-Iran interim peace deal took effect and shipping started returning to the Strait of Hormuz as the US declared an end to its blockade and a complex negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program began in earnest.

title: Hegseth Flags Review of US Forces With Europe Fearing Troop Cuts
title_cn: 赫格斯提出对美军进行审查，欧洲担心削减军队
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US will conduct a six-month review of its military presence in Europe in a confrontational speech at NATO headquarters in Brussels where he blasted some allies for a “shameful” lack of support during the recent war against Iran.

title: Lithuania's Nauseda Says Putin Can't Win the War With Ukraine
title_cn: 立陶宛总统纳乌塞达称普京无法赢得与乌克兰的战争
summary: Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda discusses the changing battlefield in Ukraine, Europe's response to the war, and President Donald Trump's push for peace. He also weighs in on Israel's role in the war with Iran, its impact on energy prices and inflation, and whether China poses a growing economic threat. He spoke with Bloomberg's Oliver Crook in Brussels. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vance Warns Israeli Cabinet Against Attacking Trump’s Iran Deal
title_cn: 万斯警告以色列内阁不要攻击特朗普的伊朗协议
summary: US Vice President JD Vance hit back at Israeli cabinet members who have criticized Donald Trump’s interim peace deal with Iran.

title: Burnham Advised By Ex-BOE, Goldman Economists Ahead of UK PM Bid
title_cn: 伯纳姆在英国首相竞选前得到前英国央行和高盛经济学家的建议
summary: Would-be UK prime minister Andy Burnham has expanded his team of economic advisers ahead of an expected tilt at the leadership this summer, in a bid to add credibility to his nascent policy platform.

title: US Student Loan Defaults Rise to 9.2 Million Amid Crackdown
title_cn: 美国学生贷款违约率在打击行动中上升至 920 万
summary: The number of student loan borrowers in default soared to a record 9.16 million in April after the government ended a four-year pause on collections that was instituted during the Covid pandemic, according to the latest data from the US Department of Education.

title: Vance Warns Israel Against Attacking Its ‘Only Powerful Ally’
title_cn: 万斯警告以色列不要攻击其“唯一强大的盟友”
summary: President Trump “is the only head of state in the entire world who is sympathetic to the nation of Israel at this moment in time,” Vice President JD Vance said, in response to Israeli officials’ criticism of the US-Iran deal. He spoke during a press briefing at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cuba Makes Market-Friendly Changes in Face of Trump Pressure
title_cn: 古巴面对特朗普压力做出有利于市场的改变
summary: Cuba’s leadership signed off on a sweeping list of 176 market-liberalization measures covering 23 core areas, as the Caribbean nation tries to rescue a moribund economy that’s being squeezed by US sanctions.

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Kicks In as Focus Shifts to Hormuz Flows
title_cn: 随着焦点转向霍尔木兹流，特朗普的伊朗协议开始生效
summary:
US President Donald Trump’s interim peace deal with Iran is starting to take effect, with focus shifting to the resumption of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and a complex 60-day negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program.
Wayne Sanders, Senior Defense Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence, discusses the memorandum and what he expects to see over the next two months as talks resume for a nuclear deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lithuania’s Nauseda Says It’s Not the Time to Talk With Putin
title_cn: 立陶宛总统纳乌塞达表示现在不是与普京交谈的时候
summary: Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda said the European Union shouldn’t rush into peace talks with Russia, distancing himself from recent EU efforts to engage Vladimir Putin.

title: Israel Foreign Minister Severs Ties With EU’s Top Diplomat
title_cn: 以色列外长与欧盟高级外交官断绝关系
summary: Israel’s foreign minister said he was cutting off all contact with the European Union’s top diplomat, Kaja Kallas, citing her “blatant unfairness” and underscoring the Jewish state’s growing isolation from many of its closest allies.

title: Australia Must be ‘Monocultural,’ Pauline Hanson Says
title_cn: 宝琳汉森说，澳大利亚必须是“单一文化”
summary: Australia’s hard-right leader Pauline Hanson has called for a “monocultural society,” rejecting decades of the country’s multiculturalism and blaming its housing crisis on high levels of immigration.

title: Vance Says Iran Deal Is a 'Win-Win' for the US
title_cn: 万斯表示伊朗协议对美国来说是“双赢”
summary: US Vice President JD Vance speaks at a news conference about President Donald Trump's signed memorandum of understanding with Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Televised Supreme Court Sessions Backed by Key Senate Panel
title_cn: 由参议院主要小组支持的最高法院电视会议
summary: The Senate Judiciary Committee approved legislation Thursday to televise Supreme Court proceedings, a step long resisted by the high court’s justices but sought by open government advocates.

title: Lithuania Expects Improvement in China Ties Within Six Months
title_cn: 立陶宛期待与中国的关系在六个月内得到改善
summary: Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda said he expects to see the first results of the country’s diplomatic outreach to China within the next six months, as the Baltic nation moves to mend ties with Beijing following a spat over Taiwan.

title: UK Government Eases Pressure on Tougher Green Building Upgrades
title_cn: 英国政府减轻了对绿色建筑升级的压力
summary: The UK has delayed rules that will require commercial landlords to meet stricter energy efficiency regulations for some of their buildings, giving building owners five years to meet the new standards while exempting smaller properties.

title: Why Releasing Iran’s Assets Is a Political Headache for Trump
title_cn: 为什么释放伊朗资产是特朗普的政治难题
summary: The US for decades has pursued a campaign of pressuring Iran economically, including by deploying measures that have frozen billions of dollars of Iranian assets situated all over the world. Now, as part of a deal to end its three-month war with the country — which has threatened economies around the globe by curtailing access to oil, gas and fertilizer — the US is offering to facilitate the release of blocked Iranian funds.

title: Modi’s Restraint in Trump Meeting Signals India’s Caution
title_cn: 莫迪在特朗普会面中的克制表明印度的谨慎
summary: US President Donald Trump showered Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi with praise in their first in-person meeting in more than a year.

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Kicks In as Focus Shifts to Hormuz Flows
title_cn: 随着焦点转向霍尔木兹流，特朗普的伊朗协议开始生效
summary: US President Donald Trump’s interim peace deal with Iran is starting to take effect, with focus shifting to the resumption of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and a complex 60-day negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program.

title: Massachusetts Court Strikes Down Tax Cut Ballot Measure
title_cn: 马萨诸塞州法院否决减税投票措施
summary: The Massachusetts Supreme Judicial Court struck down a ballot proposal for a state income-tax cut that was backed by certain business groups.

title: Lula Ally Allegedly Got Apartment, Tickets in Banco Master Fraud
title_cn: 卢拉·艾莉涉嫌在银行大师诈骗中获得公寓和门票
summary: Brazilian investigators suspect Banco Master and related entities paid for an apartment and premium concert tickets for relatives of Senator Jaques Wagner as part of a scheme to conceal kickbacks to the senior ally of President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, according to Supreme Court documents.

title: House Republican Seeks to Ban Members From Prediction Markets
title_cn: 众议院共和党人寻求禁止议员进入预测市场
summary: House members, spouses, and dependent children would be barred from wagering on prediction markets under legislation unveiled Thursday by Rep. Bryan Steil (R-Wis.), chairman of the Administration Committee.

title: Biggest Baltic Rail Project Needs EU’s Help, Latvia Premier Says
title_cn: 拉脱维亚总理表示最大的波罗的海铁路项目需要欧盟的帮助
summary: Latvia’s prime minister said he intends to approach the European Union’s executive arm with a new plan for the Rail Baltica train link, as the Baltic region’s biggest infrastructure project is unlikely to be completed on time.

title: Zimbabwe Lawmakers Back Two-Year Extension to President’s Tenure
title_cn: 津巴布韦立法者支持将总统任期延长两年
summary: Zimbabwean lawmakers approved a controversial amendment to the constitution that will lay the ground for President Emmerson Mnangagwa to extend his rule by two years.

title: Abu Dhabi’s $1 Trillion Man Emerges as Iran Troubleshooter
title_cn: 阿布扎比身价1万亿美元的人成为伊朗问题解决者
summary: Sheikh Tahnoon bin Zayed Al Nahyan is best known as the defacto business chief of Abu Dhabi’s wealthy ruling family and the man at the helm of a $1.5 trillion empire. Behind the scenes, he has taken on another role: Diplomatic emissary charged with helping rebuild the United Arab Emirates’ relationship with Iran.

title: Venezuela Hires Law Firm to Help Negotiate Oil Production Deals
title_cn: 委内瑞拉聘请律师事务所帮助谈判石油生产协议
summary: Venezuela’s short-staffed national oil company has hired international law firm Greenberg Traurig to help expedite contract negotiations with a flurry of companies ahead of a key regulatory deadline in August.
